steps.title: Relate removed to remaining
steps.content:
If $25\%$ of the original marbles were removed, then $75\%$ remained. The removed amount is one-third of the remaining amount because
$$\frac{25}{75}=\frac{1}{3}$$

steps.title: Find the removed marbles
steps.content:
The remaining amount is $300$, so the removed amount is
$$\frac{1}{3}(300)=100$$The answer is B.
